ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W for win, L for loss) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., home, away) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the game record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "special_features" TEXT /* Special features of the venue (e.g., artificial turf, retractable roof) */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  "last_renovated_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was last renovated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the venue */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the venue record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being scheduled */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the game is scheduled */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., confirmed, tentative, canceled) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the schedule record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W for win, L for loss) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., home, away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the game */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the result record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues_details" (
  "venue_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue detail entry */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the venue opened */,
  "last_renovated" TEXT /* Date the venue was last renovated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the venue */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue */,
  "historical_notes" TEXT /* Historical notes about the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue detail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the venue detail record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_details_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team manager, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
